name: The Back Nine Golf | Sherwood, OR
about: The Back Nine Golf in Sherwood, OR is a golf simulator venue that offers indoor golfing experiences. Located in the area, it provides a modern facility for golfers to practice or play year-round. The venue is designed to accommodate individual players and groups looking for a golf simulation experience without the need for an outdoor course.
why_golfers_like_it: Indoor golfing allows for year-round play regardless of weather conditions
Provides a modern facility with advanced simulation technology
Accommodates both individual players and groups for various occasions
Offers a convenient alternative to traditional outdoor golf courses

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available at the venue if you don't have your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Food and drinks are available for purchase at the venue, but outside food and drink policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18-hole simulation times vary depending on the number of players and pace of play, but typically range from 2-3 hours.

faq.question: Is The Back Nine Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly and welcomes families with children to enjoy the golf simulation experience.
